title: Portuguese Style Peanut Fritters
description: A sweet and crispy Portuguese inspired dessert made with peanut brittle and deep-fried to perfection.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and a pinch of salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the eggs and vanilla extract.
Add the crushed peanut brittle to the dry ingredients and mix until well combined.
Pour in the egg mixture and mix until a smooth batter forms.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan or a deep fryer to 350°F.
Using a spoon, drop the batter into the hot oil, making sure not to overcrowd the pan.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters warm and enjoy!
